Supplier Commission Terms

Transparent commission-only model

Trek Africa Guide does not charge suppliers listing fees, setup fees, or monthly subscription fees. The platform earns commission only when a direct booking is confirmed, paid, and marked completed or fulfilled.

Affiliate products may redirect travelers to an external partner or provider. Direct-booking products are tracked inside Supabase bookings and payouts.

1. Gross booking

The customer payment total is stored as the booking total.

2. Commission

Default, supplier, or product commission rate is applied automatically.

3. Net payout

Supplier payout equals booking total minus commission.

Example

If a completed booking total is USD 1,000 and the commission rate is 18%, Trek Africa Guide commission is USD 180 and supplier payout is USD 820.

Formula: supplier payout = booking total - (booking total x commission rate / 100).

Payout schedule

Supplier payouts are prepared monthly for completed, paid bookings that have not already been included in a payout batch. Payouts may be sent by bank transfer or supported African mobile money providers such as MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, M-Pesa, Orange Money, or Wave.
